ksa_text: Monitor organizational compliance with privacy regulations and data protection requirements through continuous assessment and periodic audits.

dcwf.top_element_label: Create and/or maintain processes to ensure data management efforts comply with AI ethical principles.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-T-005 (Security and Privacy/Task) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.453, highest: DDaT at 0.453). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. Master data management: MDM platforms, golden records, entity resolution, data matching/merging, reference data management, and master data governance.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.453, and Security and Privacy (SP) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Security and Privacy KSA (composite 0.453)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Master Data Manager job postings does not surface this Security and Privacy competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
